title: selaginella saltuicola
intro: Selaginella saltuicola, also known as the Saltbush Spikemoss or Saltwort Spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Selaginella saltuicola include potential uses in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Selaginella saltuicola are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
